description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Static Analysis that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have two jobs, cppcheck and clang-tidy, both running on ubuntu-latest. The cppcheck job should install cppcheck, run it on the lwlog/src directory, and upload the results as an artifact. The clang-tidy job should install clang-tidy, generate a compile_commands.json file, run clang-tidy on the lwlog/src directory, and upload the results as an artifact.
